settings.title: Page header
settings.text: Add a brief introduction to the FAQ page.

settings.bm_question: What is magnesium?
settings.bm_answer: Magnesium is a mineral your body uses for calm, sleep quality, and muscle relaxation.

settings.bm_question: Why does Bubble Me focus on magnesium?
settings.bm_answer: Because many people feel tired, stressed, tight, or restless. Magnesium rituals are a simple way to reset.

settings.bm_question: What is Epsom salt?
settings.bm_answer: Epsom salt is magnesium sulphate. It’s commonly used in warm water soaks.

settings.bm_question: Is Bubble Me a medicine brand?
settings.bm_answer: No. Bubble Me products are wellness and self‑care rituals, not medicines.

settings.bm_question: Do I need a bathtub for a magnesium soak?
settings.bm_answer: No. A bucket/foot tub works great.

settings.bm_question: How long should I soak?
settings.bm_answer: 15–20 minutes is a good sweet spot.

settings.bm_question: How often should I do a soak?
settings.bm_answer: Most people do 2–4 times a week, or whenever the body feels heavy.

settings.bm_question: What water temperature should I use?
settings.bm_answer: Warm and comfortable. Not burning hot.

settings.bm_question: Outside magnesium vs inside magnesium — what’s the difference?
settings.bm_answer: Soaks/balm = outside calming ritual. Tablets = daily inside support.

settings.bm_question: Can I combine soaks + tablets?
settings.bm_answer: Yes. Many people like “inside + outside” magnesium as a routine.

settings.bm_question: When should I take The Yellow Ritual tablet?
settings.bm_answer: After a meal, at a time you can stick to daily (morning or evening).

settings.bm_question: I’m stressed, what’s the simplest magnesium routine?
settings.bm_answer: A 15–20 min warm soak at night, 2–3 times a week.

settings.bm_question: I can’t sleep, what should I try first?
settings.bm_answer: Try a warm soak in the evening + reduce screens for 30 minutes. Keep it simple.

settings.bm_question: I’m sore after workouts, what’s a good magnesium ritual?
settings.bm_answer: A warm Epsom soak after training days.

settings.bm_question: My head feels heavy, what’s a quick ritual?
settings.bm_answer: Minute Mend balm + slow breathing for 2 minutes.

settings.bm_question: Does magnesium work if my diet is not perfect?
settings.bm_answer: Yes. Think of it as support, not a perfect‑life requirement.

settings.bm_question: Is magnesium safe for everyone?
settings.bm_answer: Most people can use these rituals, but if you’re pregnant, breastfeeding, on medication, or have a medical condition—check with your doctor.

settings.bm_question: Can kids use magnesium soaks?
settings.bm_answer: For kids, we recommend doctor guidance first.

settings.bm_question: What’s the biggest mistake people make with magnesium?
settings.bm_answer: Trying it once, expecting magic, and stopping. This works best as a repeat ritual.

settings.bm_question: Are Bubble Me products safe for sensitive skin?
settings.bm_answer: Most people can use them, but if you’re sensitive—do a patch test first.

settings.bm_question: Can I use bath salts on cuts or irritated skin?
settings.bm_answer: Yes. Apply a tiny amount on a small skin area and wait.

settings.bm_question: Can I use Minute Mend near my eyes?
settings.bm_answer: No. Avoid eye area.

settings.bm_question: I feel a burning sensation, what should I do?
settings.bm_answer: Stop use, rinse with water, and contact support if needed.

settings.bm_question: I feel a burning sensation, what should I do?
settings.bm_answer: Stop use, rinse with water, and contact support if needed.

settings.bm_question: Are Bubble Me products for men too?
settings.bm_answer: Yes.

settings.bm_question: Are these products safe during pregnancy/breastfeeding?
settings.bm_answer: Please consult your doctor before use.

settings.bm_question: Can I use these products if I have a medical condition?
settings.bm_answer: If you have a medical condition or take medicines, consult your doctor.

settings.bm_question: Do you accept returns if I don’t like the product?
settings.bm_answer: Due to product nature, returns are usually not accepted for “changed mind” cases.

settings.bm_question: What if my product arrives damaged?
settings.bm_answer: Share photos/videos quickly with support. Damage cases are handled after verification.

settings.bm_question: Can I get a replacement?
settings.bm_answer: If it’s a verified damage/shipping issue, support will guide you.

settings.bm_question: Do you have gifting options?
settings.bm_answer: Yes. You can gift packs/sachets and build a simple self‑care combo.

settings.bm_question: What’s a safe gifting option if I don’t know their problem?
settings.bm_answer: Reset Kit is the easiest gift because it covers multiple concerns.

settings.bm_question: Can I add a gift note?
settings.bm_answer: If the website supports notes at checkout, add it there. If not, message support.

settings.bm_question: What should I write to support for fastest help?
settings.bm_answer: Order ID + your issue in one line + photos/videos if relevant.

settings.bm_question: How do I know I’m buying from the official Bubble Me store?
settings.bm_answer: Order only from the official website or official marketplace listings.

settings.bm_question: If I’m confused, what’s the simplest decision path?
settings.bm_answer: Pick your goal (Sleep/Stress/Muscle/Head comfort) → choose format (sachet vs pack) → start with 2–3 uses and then decide.

settings.bm_question: What payment methods are available?
settings.bm_answer: Online payments and COD (if available for your location).

settings.bm_question: Is COD available everywhere?
settings.bm_answer: COD depends on your pincode/courier rules. You’ll see it at checkout if eligible.

settings.bm_question: Is there any extra charge for COD?
settings.bm_answer: If any fee applies, it will show clearly at checkout.

settings.bm_question: Can I apply a coupon code?
settings.bm_answer: Yes, apply it at checkout.

settings.bm_question: My coupon isn’t working. Why?
settings.bm_answer: It may be expired or not applicable on that cart. Check conditions.

settings.bm_question: Can I use two coupons together?
settings.bm_answer: Usually one code per order.

settings.bm_question: I paid but didn’t get order confirmation.
settings.bm_answer: Wait 5–10 minutes, check email/SMS, then contact support with transaction details.

settings.bm_question: My payment failed but money got deducted.
settings.bm_answer: Share the transaction screenshot with support. It usually auto‑reverses, but support will confirm.

settings.bm_question: How long do refunds take?
settings.bm_answer: Refund timelines depend on the bank/payment method. Support will share the status.

settings.bm_question: Can I pay using UPI?
settings.bm_answer: If UPI is available on your checkout options, you’ll see it.

settings.bm_question: Will I receive an invoice?
settings.bm_answer: Order details are shared on email/SMS. For invoice needs, support can help.

settings.bm_question: Where do I report a payment issue?
settings.bm_answer: Contact support with Order ID + transaction proof.

settings.bm_question: Which Bubble Me product should I start with?
settings.bm_answer: If you’re new, start with a soak: Reset Kit or a big pack (Spoil Yourself / Epsom).

settings.bm_question: What is Spoil Yourself (400g big pack)?
settings.bm_answer: A big pack bath salt for regular, all‑round relaxing soaks.

settings.bm_question: What is Pure Epsom Salt (1kg big pack)?
settings.bm_answer: A big pack of magnesium sulphate (Epsom) for simple recovery‑style soaks.

settings.bm_question: What is The Reset Kit?
settings.bm_answer: A pack of 4 small sachets (50g each) for targeted moments.

settings.bm_question: What’s the easiest way to choose between pack vs sachet?
settings.bm_answer: Sachets = try and test (one‑time use). Packs = regular routine (more value per use).

settings.bm_question: Spoil Yourself vs Epsom Salt — what’s the difference?
settings.bm_answer: Spoil Yourself = spa‑style blend. Epsom = simpler magnesium recovery soak.

settings.bm_question: Reset Kit vs big packs — what’s the difference?
settings.bm_answer: Reset Kit = specific concerns in small sachets. Big packs = daily/weekly routine.

settings.bm_question: I feel stressed and overstimulated. What should I buy?
settings.bm_answer: Anti‑Stress sachet (Reset Kit) for quick calm nights.

settings.bm_question: My body feels sore and tight. What should I buy
settings.bm_answer: Epsom Salt (1kg pack) for muscle recovery soaks.

settings.bm_question: I don’t have a bathtub. Which product is best?
settings.bm_answer: Any of them. Bucket/foot soak works with sachets and packs.

settings.bm_question: Can men use Bubble Me products?
settings.bm_answer: Yes. These are body rituals—anyone can use them.

settings.bm_question: Can I mix Spoil Yourself + Epsom together?
settings.bm_answer: Yes, you can layer them if you want a stronger soak.

settings.bm_question: Can I use a balm + soak on the same day?
settings.bm_answer: Yes. Balm in the day, soak at night is a common combo.

settings.bm_question: What’s a good “starter combo” cart?
settings.bm_answer: Reset Kit + 1 big pack (Spoil Yourself or Epsom) + Minute Mend (optional).

settings.bm_question: How do I store the packs/sachets?
settings.bm_answer: Keep them tightly sealed and away from moisture.

settings.bm_question: Do these products have a strong fragrance?
settings.bm_answer: They’re meant to feel spa‑like. If you’re fragrance‑sensitive, start with a smaller amount and patch test.

settings.bm_question: How do I place an order?
settings.bm_answer: Choose products → add to cart → checkout → pay → you’ll get confirmation.

settings.bm_question: Do I need to create an account?
settings.bm_answer: No. Guest checkout works.

settings.bm_question: How long does delivery take?
settings.bm_answer: Delivery time depends on your location. You’ll see updates after dispatch.

settings.bm_question: How long does delivery take?
settings.bm_answer: Delivery time depends on your location. You’ll see updates after dispatch.

settings.bm_question: Do you ship pan‑India?
settings.bm_answer: Yes, within India.

settings.bm_question: How do I track my order?
settings.bm_answer: After dispatch, you’ll get a tracking link on email/SMS.

settings.bm_question: I didn’t receive tracking. What should I do?
settings.bm_answer: Check spam/promotions. If still not found, contact support with your order details.

settings.bm_question: Can I change my address after ordering?
settings.bm_answer: If not shipped, support may help. After dispatch, changes are usually not possible.

settings.bm_question: Can I cancel my order?
settings.bm_answer: If it hasn’t shipped, yes—contact support ASAP.

settings.bm_question: I want urgent delivery. Can you do it?
settings.bm_answer: It depends on courier service in your area. Support can guide you if possible.

settings.bm_question: My order is delayed. What should I do?
settings.bm_answer: Share your tracking link with support. They’ll check with the courier.

settings.bm_question: My package shows delivered but I didn’t get it.
settings.bm_answer: Contact support immediately. Also check with your building/security.

settings.bm_question: I received the wrong item.
settings.bm_answer: Send photos of the package + items to support. They’ll fix it.

settings.bm_question: I received less items than I ordered.
settings.bm_answer: Share an unboxing video/photos with support for quick resolution.

settings.bm_question: My order arrived damaged.
settings.bm_answer: Share clear photos/videos with support as soon as possible.

settings.bm_question: What if the product is out of stock?
settings.bm_answer: You can join waitlist or ask support for restock timeline/alternative.

settings.bm_question: Where do I contact Bubble Me for order help?
settings.bm_answer: Use the Contact Us option on the website and share your Order ID.
